name_en: Exclusive photo M11623 This Pochette Accessoire XL handbag is presented in Monogram Dust canvas, featuring a Monogram pattern weathered by time, injecting a bold spirit into the classic silhouette from 1990. The spacious main zip compartment features a patch pocket, along with a non-functional tassel nameplate and removable Marque L.Vuitton Déposée decoration. Monogram Dust coated canvas - aged calfskin trim - fabric lining - metal hardware - main zip compartment - interior patch pocket - non-functional removable tassel nameplate - removable round decoration - shoulder strap: removable, adjustable - dimensions: 28x16.5x9CM
